'''zangogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyengadu|pyengadu]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ng-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyengadu|pyengadu]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zangogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || zængegeth || zængegej || zængegesh || zængege
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || zangongogoth || zangongogoj || zangongogosh || zangongogo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || zangogoth || zangogoj || zangogosh || zangogo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || zangofgofth || zangofgofj || zangofgofsh || zangofgof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || zangogotho || zangogojo || zangogosho || zangogoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || zangogoth || zangogoj || zangogosh || zangogo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || zangogothol || zangogojol || zangogoshol || zangogokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || zangogoothotho || zangogoojojo || zangogooshosho || zangogooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || zangogothon || zangogojon || zangogoshon || zangogokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || zangogothooro || zangogojooro || zangogoshooro || zangogokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
